excluded_router_paths./.well-known/agent.json: Mesh discovery metadata is intentionally outside the OpenAPI application route surface.
excluded_router_paths./a2a: The mesh transport ingress path is intentionally excluded from the application OpenAPI surface.
excluded_router_paths./api/openapi.json: The schema endpoint itself is intentionally not modeled as an application data route.
excluded_router_paths./api/ws: The websocket upgrade endpoint is not represented in the current OpenAPI document.
